judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly attributes the constitutional amendment establishing minimum retirement ages to the Michel Temer government and EC 95, when it was the Bolsonaro government and EC 103.
The model incorrectly attributes the establishment of minimum age for retirement to the government of Michel Temer and Emenda Constitucional nº 95, instead of the Bolsonaro government and EC 103.

The response incorrectly attributes the minimum retirement age reform to the Temer government and EC 95 (which was actually the spending cap amendment), when in fact it was EC 103 approved in 2019 during the Bolsonaro government.
